title: cyperus bequaertii
intro: Cyperus bequaertii, also known as the Dwarf Papyrus or Bequaert's Cyperus, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus bequaertii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Cyperus bequaertii are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in African and Asian traditional medicine.
